title: antennaria friesiana subsp. compacta
intro: Antennaria friesiana subsp. compacta, also known as Elbow Joint or Mountain Elbow, is a compact subspecies of the perennial plant species Antennaria friesiana, belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its leaves and stems. The health benefits of Antennaria friesiana subsp. compacta include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support immune function, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Antennaria friesiana subsp. compacta is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and address various health conditions.
